---
title: "Agents and Design"
date: 2026-04-15
description: "It is all an org design problem... Always has been"
image: ""
twitter-card:
  image: ""
open-graph:
  image: ""
categories:
  - social science
  - Organisation design
  - AI
resources:
  - "img/*"
doi: ""
citation: true
draft: true
---

Reading why you can't sell an agent
https://substack.com/home/post/p-194628481

https://fortune.com/article/why-do-thousands-of-ceos-believe-ai-not-having-impact-productivity-employment-study/

https://substack.com/home/post/p-193648478

And response to Kellogg
https://muninn.austegard.com/blog/the-90-percent-is-moving.html
